name: Acorns
description: Plant them to grow an oak tree.

name: Amber
description: <color=yellow>Valuable</color>

name: Amber Pearl
description: <color=yellow>Valuable</color>

name: Ancient Seed
description: Held against your ear, you hear tiny whisperings within...

name: Breastplate of Ask
description: The first man in Midgard knew how to guard his most vital organs, perhaps with a breastplate just like this one.

name: Trousers of Ask
description: The first man to roam Midgard preferred to tread lightly. Wearers of these trousers could learn a thing or two from him.

name: Patterns of the Bear
description: If these intricate designs can protect warriors from distant lands, they can surely protect you too.

name: Loincloth of the Bear
description: It covers all the important bits, but not much else.

name: Vilebone Cage
description: Crafted from the shattered bones of a tormented bear.

name: Vilebone Drapes
description: Thick hides and bone fragments woven into a rugged skirt.

name: Bronze Plate Tunic
description: A breastplate of hammered bronze.

name: Bronze Plate Leggings
description: Bronze greaves to shield your legs.

name: Carapace Breastplate
description: A breastplate crafted from the burnished carapace of a giant insect.

name: Carapace Greaves
description: Leg guards of a rigid carapace.

name: Plain Brown Dress
description: A plain brown dress, worn over a blue underdress.

name: Simple Undyed Dress
description: A simple dress for everyday wear.

name: Brown Dress with Shawl
description: A brown dress, with a matching shawl around the shoulders. Warm and stylish!

name: Brown Dress with Beads
description: A fancy brown dress, with beads and silver fibula brooches. Excellent for a feast!

name: Plain Blue Dress
description: A plain blue dress, worn over a red underdress.

name: Blue Dress with Shawl
description: A blue dress, with a green shawl around the shoulders. Warm and stylish!

name: Blue Dress with Beads
description: A fancy blue dress, with beads and bronze fibula brooches. Excellent for a feast!

name: Plain Yellow Dress
description: A plain yellow dress, worn over a green underdress.

name: Yellow Dress with Shawl
description: A yellow dress, with a purple shawl around the shoulders. Warm and stylish!

name: Yellow Dress with Beads
description: A fancy yellow dress, with beads and silver fibula brooches. Excellent for a feast!

name: Fenris Coat
description: The beast could draw deep breaths, so that its howl could be heard far across the land.

name: Fenris Leggings
description: The legs of the beast were lean and strong, so that it could leap great strides.

name: Flametal Breastplate
description: This fusion of mysterious flametal and charred bones serves as a protective layer more resilient than anything you could ever find in Midgard.

name: Flametal Greaves
description: Heavy trousers insulate against the heat, while solid greaves keep your shins safe from low blows.

name: Harvest Tunic
description: When working the fields, it's important to dress accordingly. A shorter tunic lets in a cool breeze.

name: Harvest Dress
description: When working the fields, it's important to dress accordingly. This long dress keeps your knees covered while you work.

name: Iron Scale Mail
description: An iron scale mail, this will turn all but the strongest of blows.

name: Iron Greaves
description: Iron greaves to protect your legs.

name: Leather Tunic
description: A tunic made from animal hide.

name: Leather Trousers
description: They squeak a little when you walk.

name: Eitr-weave Robe
description: These artfully layered robes have spells and charms sewn into every seam and fold.

name: Robes of Embla
description: Imbued with the power of the first sorceress, these robes will grant a boon to any who seeks to wield the ancient art of magic.

name: Eitr-weave Trousers
description: The trousers worn by mages are always especially tight. Discomfort fuels the focus that is needed for magic...

name: Trousers of Embla
description: Whether or not the first sorceress actually wore trousers exactly like these, we can never know.

name: Padded Cuirass
description: Finely wrought and strong enough to turn even the sharpest blades.

name: Padded Greaves
description: Expertly crafted leg protection.

name: Rag Tunic
description: Better than nothing.

name: Rag Trousers
description: A simple remedy for nudity.

name: Root Harnesk
description: Finely wrought and strong enough to turn even the sharpest blades.

name: Root Leggings
description: A light armour oddly woven together by ancient roots and bark.

name: Troll Leather Tunic
description: Trolls are hard to skin but their leather is tough and warm.

name: Troll Leather Trousers
description: Leggings of tough troll hide.

name: Plain Blue Tunic
description: A plain blue tunic, brightly dyed.

name: Simple Undyed Tunic
description: A simple tunic for everyday wear.

name: Blue Tunic with Cape
description: A blue tunic, worn with a fashionable cape made from fine brown wool.

name: Blue Tunic with Beads
description: A blue tunic worn with beads and silver jewelry. Sure to attract attention from other vikings.

name: Plain Red Tunic
description: A plain red tunic, brightly dyed.

name: Red Tunic with Cape
description: A red tunic, worn with a fashionable cape made from fine green wool.

name: Red Tunic with Beads
description: A red tunic worn with beads and bronze jewelry. Sure to attract attention from other vikings.

name: Plain Yellow Tunic
description: A plain yellow tunic, brightly dyed.

name: Yellow Tunic with Cape
description: A yellow tunic, worn with a fashionable cape made from fine purple wool.

name: Yellow Tunic with Beads
description: A yellow tunic worn with beads and silver jewelry. Sure to attract attention from other vikings.

name: Wolf Hide Chestpiece
description: A wolfskin jerkin, warm and wild-looking. It protects against the cold.

name: Wolf Hide Trousers
description: Shaggy breeches of wolfskin.

name: Bronzehead Arrow
description: Sharper than flint. A sleek messenger of death.

name: Carapace Arrow
description: Heavy and pointy, this one's gonna hurt.

name: Charred Arrow
description: This arrow has been whittled into shape from a charred femur, and it's as hard as any metal.

name: Fire Arrow
description: This arrow burns whatever it pierces.

name: Flinthead Arrow
description: A hide-breaker with a head of flint.

name: Frost Arrow
description: A shard of piercing ice.

name: Ironhead Arrow
description: Capped with iron and flighted with dark feathers.

name: Needle Arrow
description: The final stitch.

name: Obsidian Arrow
description: A sliver of darkness.

name: Poison Arrow
description: A bitter sting from afar.

name: Silver Arrow
description: A needle to calm restless spirits.

name: Wood Arrow
description: An arrow of sharpened wood.

name: Asksvin Bladder
description: An acidic smell still lingers. Prominently.

name: Asksvin Hide
description: This sturdy leather is thick, and still warm to the touch.

name: Asksvin Neck
description: A neck in its final stage of life.

name: Asksvin Pelvis
description: The pelvic bone of a four legged creature.

name: Asksvin Ribcage
description: These ribs have already been stripped clean of any meat.

name: Asksvin Skull
description: A thick skull, with room for a surprisingly large brain.

name: Asksvin Egg
description: Hard as rock, yet you can sense the presence of something inside. This should be kept warm.

name: Asksvin Tail
description: Smells a bit smokey, even when raw.

name: Black Metal Atgeir
description: A vicious hewing-axe of almost unbreakable black metal.

name: Bronze Atgeir
description: A true warrior's tool.

name: Himminafl
description: It might not be a hammer, but Thor himself would still approve of this weapon.

name: Iron Atgeir
description: Blood-drinker, skull-cracker, death-bringer.

name: Wooden Atgeir
description: It might not hurt a lot, but it has reach!

name: Berserkir Axes
description: Let your rage take over and face the slaughter.

name: Bleeding Berserkir Axes
description: The closer you are to death, the harder you are sure to hit.

name: Thundering Berserkir Axes
description: Carnage spreads around you when you wield these axes, such that Thor himself would be proud.

name: Primal Berserkir Axes
description: Your most primal instincts take over, and the nature around you reaches out to aid you.

name: Black Metal Axe
description: A perfectly-balanced axe forged from dark metal with an emerald sheen.

name: Bronze Axe
description: A bright and burnished blade, curved like a smile.

name: Early Axes
description: Mighty weapons from long ago, from a time when the world was still young and incomplete...

name: Flint Axe
description: Sharper than stone.

name: Curious Axe Head
description: The metal glints oddly in the sunlight. Somehow, you know that it can never be complete on its own...

name: Mysterious Axe Head
description: What battles has this weapon borne witness to? You cannot see its past, only shape its future...

name: Iron Axe
description: Sharp and strong, a woodcutter's friend.

name: Jotun Bane
description: Not even the giants of old could weather the poisonous bite of this weapon.

name: Stone Axe
description: A crude axe for tree-felling.

name: Wooden Axe
description: If this axe could chop wood, wouldn't that be strange?

name: Barber Kit
description: A kit fit for the finest of barbers.

name: Barley
description: A bundle of barley.

name: Barley Flour
description: Great for baking bread.

name: Fire Resistance Barley Wine
description: Fortifies you against fire.

name: Barley Wine Base: Fire Resistance
description: Needs to be fermented.

name: Barrel Hoops
description: These metal rings are perfectly round, suitable for holding a barrel together. Just add wood!

name: Battleaxe
description: Skull-splitter, a warrior's joy.

name: Black Metal Battleaxe
description: Green shall be the last thing your foes see before you cleave them in half.

name: Crystal Battleaxe
description: It's see-through and tears through.

name: Skull Splittur
description: Will find skulls to split even in the thickest of mists.

name: Wooden Battleaxe
description: Intimidating, but not as intimidating as the real thing.

name: Beech Seeds
description: Plant them to grow a beech tree.

name: Bell
description: For whom does the bell toll?

name: Bell Fragment
description: This ancient fragment appears to be a piece of a broken bell...

name: Megingjord
description: Gives the wearer superhuman strength.

name: Bilebag
description: Caustic bile drawn from the corpse of a gjall.

name: Birch Seeds
description: Plant them to grow a birch tree.

name: Bear Hide
description: A thick and furry hide, coarse yet incredibly soft.

name: Bear Meat
description: This fatty meat was once meant to sustain a body through hibernation.

name: Bear Paw
description: Sharp claws suitable for picking berries – or for dismembering.

name: Black Core
description: Filled to the brim with ancient power.

name: Black Marble
description: A block of solid stone, seamed with shifting colors.

name: Black Metal
description: A heavy bar of dark metal.

name: Black Metal Scrap
description: A twisted hunk of dark metal.

name: Black Soup
description: A perfect balance of sweetness and acidity.

name: Ashwood
description: Wood hardened by fire and ash.

name: Corked Vial
description: Thick enough to contain something volatile, yet fragile enough to be shattered.

name: Blood Pudding
description: It's bloody tasty.

name: Bloodbag
description: The contents of a leech. Ick!

name: Blueberries
description: Tiny but tasty.

name: Boar Jerky
description: Lean and salty.

name: Black Metal Bolt
description: A sleek bolt of dark metal.

name: Bone Bolt
description: A crude bolt of yellowed bone.

name: Carapace Bolt
description: A heavy and solid bolt.

name: Charred Bolt
description: A sturdy bone from a forearm, shaped into a deadly bolt.

name: Iron Bolt
description: A sturdy iron missile.

name: Bile Bomb
description: Handle with care.

name: Blob Bomb: Frost
description: If you hold it for too long your hand might just freeze in place.

name: Blob Bomb: Lava
description: The vial is hot in your hand, promising fiery destruction.

name: Blob Bomb: Poison
description: Should this vial break, caution is strongly advised.

name: Blob Bomb: Elite Poison
description: Breathing in the fumes is not recommended.

name: Blob Bomb: Tar
description: The sticky substance within pulses, as if threatening you.

name: Basalt Bomb
description: With enough heat, it solidifies upon explosion.

name: Ooze Bomb
description: The stench is unbearable...

name: Explosive Payload
description: Best used with a catapult. Handle with care.

name: Smoke Bomb
description: Everyone knows you can't breathe in the smoke.

name: Bone Fragments
description: A pile of shattered bones.

name: Bonemaw Meat
description: A tasty, white fish meat. Very good for your bones!

name: Bonemaw Scale
description: It looks just like bone. Best not to question the anatomy of this creature too much...

name: Bonemaw Tooth
description: This has caused the death of many a brave sailor.

name: Crude Bow
description: A crude but functional bow.

name: Ash Fang
description: Risen again from the ashes, this bow holds unyielding strength.

name: Blood Fang
description: Arrows loosed from this bow will tear into flesh with unmatched ferocity.

name: Root Fang
description: Like the twisting branch was made to seek the sun, this bow was made to seek the slaughter.

name: Storm Fang
description: Let your arrows fly as swift as the lightning strikes.

name: Draugr Fang
description: Dark wood strung with glistening sinew. A vicious thing.

name: Finewood Bow
description: A simple bow of strong and supple wood.

name: Huntsman Bow
description: Finely worked and strung. A huntsman's joy.

name: Spinesnap
description: Using this bow is backbreaking work but so worth it.

name: Bread
description: A tasty loaf of bread.

name: Bread Dough
description: Ready for the oven.

name: Bronze
description: A strong alloy of copper and tin.

name: Bronze Nails
description: Used in construction of ships and furniture.

name: Scrap Bronze
description: It's old and oxidized but can be smelted and used again.

name: Seeker Meat
description: When you crack open their shells, the meat within is tender and succulent.

name: Candle Wick
description: Steep these in something flammable for a long lasting and cosy light source.

name: Ashen Cape
description: Thin metal threads are woven into this cape to create an intricate pattern, like a destiny woven by the Norns themselves.

name: Asksvin Cloak
description: This thick cape catches the wind, not unlike the sail of a ship.

name: Deer Hide Cape
description: Rustic chic.

name: Feather Cape
description: Donning this cape makes you feel lighter, almost as if you could fly!

name: Linen Cape
description: A simple traveler's cape.

name: Lox Cape
description: A pelt from one of the great beasts, thick and warm.

name: Cape of Odin
description: Odin's finest warriors deserve the finest cloth.

name: Troll Hide Cape
description: Trollskin is tough and supple.

name: Wolf Fur Cape
description: Wolves are natural survivors. This one was just unlucky. Now its pelt will warm you in the snow.

name: Carapace
description: A plate of chitinous armour.

name: Carrot
description: An orange treat.

name: Carrot Seeds
description: Plant these if you like carrots...

name: Carrot Soup
description: A warm tasty soup made of mostly carrots.

name: Grausten Payload
description: Best used with a catapult. Make sure nothing fragile is in the way.

name: Celestial Feather
description: The only remnant of the fallen valkyrie's former self.

name: Ceramic Plate
description: No matter how hot this gets, the other side of it remains strangely cool.

name: Chain
description: A link of iron chain.

name: Charcoal Resin
description: The resin from a tree that was set ablaze a long time ago. It's still ready to burn some more.

name: Charred Bone
description: Followed by the distinct smell of burnt meat.

name: Charred Cogwheel
description: This could be used for some clever machinery...

name: Charred Skull
description: The blackened skull of a long-dead warrior. It's unlikely that a proper burial would grant them any peace.

name: Egg
description: Keep it warm to see what comes out.. but what came first, really?

name: Chicken Meat
description: All chickens bear the ancestral curse of being delicious.

name: Chitin
description: A shard of crustacean shell.

name: Cloudberries
description: The gold of the forest.

name: Club
description: A crude but useful weapon.

name: Coal
description: A lump of coal.

name: Coins
description: <color=yellow>Valuable</color>

name: Cooked Asksvin Tail
description: This meat has a potent and mature flavour, but is very tasty when grilled right.

name: Cooked Bear Meat
description: Tastes like victory.

name: Cooked Bonemaw Meat
description: The boiling sea did nothing to this meat, but grilling it over the fire has given it a delightful crisp.

name: Cooked Seeker Meat
description: Succulent white meat. A true delicacy.

name: Cooked Chicken Meat
description: It tastes like chicken.

name: Cooked Deer Meat
description: All that running paid off.

name: Cooked Egg
description: Sunny side up!

name: Cooked Hare Meat
description: Stringy but flavorful.

name: Cooked Lox Meat
description: A great hunk of tender meat, food fit for Valhalla!

name: Cooked Boar Meat
description: An earthly taste.

name: Cooked Volture Meat
description: A chewy and somewhat dry meat. Some seasoning would probably make it taste better, but it'll fill your stomach regardless.

name: Cooked Wolf Meat
description: A wild taste.

name: Copper
description: A bar of pure copper ready to be worked.

name: Copper Ore
description: Unrefined copper. Needs to be refined in a smelter.

name: Copper Scrap
description: One person's scrap is another person's treasure.

name: Arbalest
description: A slow but powerful weapon.

name: Ripper
description: Rips your foes apart, simple as that.

name: Wound Ripper
description: Ready to rend your enemies to pieces.

name: Storm Ripper
description: The bolts will tear through your enemies like a particularly nasty gale.

name: Root Ripper
description: If the bolt doesn't pin your foe in place, the roots surging up from the ground surely will.

name: Swamp Key
description: Partly covered in caked mud, it smells foetid.

name: Crystal
description: A shard of crystal from deep within the earth.

name: Cultivator
description: A farming tool for tilling soil.

name: Cured Squirrel Hamstring
description: Elastic and strong. This tendon must have come from a quick and agile animal.

name: Dandelion
description: Some call it a weed, but it's pretty nonetheless.

name: Deer Hide
description: A cleaned hide from a deer.

name: Deer Meat
description: $item_deer_meat_description

name: Deer Stew
description: Fall-apart tender.

name: Wisplight
description: A bound wisp to guide you through the thickest of mists.

name: Dragon Egg
description: Far heavier than it looks, with a faint humming sound from within.

name: Dragon Tear
description: The last frozen tear of a dragon, pulsating with mysterious energy.

name: Arbalest
description: A slow but powerful weapon.

name: Sealbreaker
description: An object used to break a Dverger seal.

name: Sealbreaker Fragment
description: A fragment of a Dvergr sealbreaker.

name: Dvergr Extractor
description: Looks like a perfect piece for piercing something...

name: Dyrnwyn Blade Fragment
description: Parts of an old blade. If all the pieces were reassembled it could likely be made whole.

name: Dyrnwyn Hilt Fragment
description: The hilt of a long forgotten sword. Perhaps it could be reforged if one had all the pieces...

name: Dyrnwyn Tip Fragment
description: This shard of metal looks like the tip of a sword. One might be able to reforge the blade if more pieces are found...

name: Ectoplasm
description: A restless essence of a once living thing...

name: Refined Eitr
description: This is the stuff of life, the poison that consumes itself. The Dvergr refine it to use in their esoteric designs.

name: Ancient Bark
description: An ancient and sturdy material.

name: Entrails
description: A slimy length of something's insides.

name: Eyescream
description: Crispy cool and creamy.

name: Fader Relic
description: The mystical power will be revealed another day.

name: Ashlands Gourmet Bowl
description: It's hard to tell whether the steam coming off of this dish is because it's freshly cooked or because of the asksvin meat in it. Either way, the spiced meat together with the vineberries and fiddlehead sprouts is so delicious that it doesn't matter!

name: Black Forest Buffet Platter
description: You won't be able to resist this platter of delights from the Black Forest! Venison sirloin steaks are served together with spiced thistles and carrots, and the whole meal is tied together with delicious jams. Just have one more bite!

name: Whole Roasted Meadow Boar
description: A boar that has been roasted to perfection, glazed and served atop a bed of greens, with additional cuts of meat on the side. A feast like this is sure to fill your stomach and brighten your day!

name: Mushrooms Galore á la Mistlands
description: The time has come for mushroom enthusiasts to rejoice! Try different kinds of mushrooms, mushroom marinated seeker meat and mushroom-filled misthare, and don't miss out on the tasty sap dressing.

name: Hearty Mountain Logger's Stew
description: Gather around this steaming pot full of deliciousness and warm yourselves up again after a day out in the cold. The usually tough and chewey wolf meat has become tender enough to practically melt in your mouth, and the onions and carrots are made even tastier with exciting spices.

name: Sailor's Bounty
description: Fish, fish, and more fish! And also serpent meat, cut to look like fish! Explore the flavours of the Ocean, along with some grilled greens for those still practicing their sea legs.

name: Plains Pie Picnic
description: There's nothing plain about this feast! Enjoy pies and loaves fresh from the oven, both sweet and savoury, and experience the culinary equivalent of a hug.

name: Swamp Dweller's Delight
description: Who knew that leeches were edible? With the correct preparation (lots of cooking and lots of seasoning) you will be able to serve them in this feast for the culinary brave. For those who have a sensitive stomach, there are also tasty skewers of sausages and turnips on the side.

name: Serving Tray
description:
Set the table with whatever food and drink you fancy, and impress your guests with a delicious feast.

<color=yellow>Once a feast has been eaten of, it won't return any resources if dismantled.</color>

name: Feathers
description: A small pile of feathers.

name: Fiddlehead
description: Veggies with a twist!

name: Fiery Svinstew
description: This musty stew is a necessity on every adventurer's menu.

name: Finewood
description: High quality wood for fine carpentry.

name: Fir Cone
description: Plant it to grow a fir tree.

name: Blue Fireworks
description: This rocket's blasting off again!

name: Cyan Fireworks
description: This rocket's blasting off again!

name: Green Fireworks
description: This rocket's blasting off again!

name: Purple Fireworks
description: This rocket's blasting off again!

name: Red Fireworks
description: This rocket's blasting off again!

name: Basic Fireworks
description: This rocket's blasting off again!

name: Yellow Fireworks
description: This rocket's blasting off again!

name: Perch
description: A tasty whitemeat fish.

name: Northern Salmon
description: This fish likes the water to be almost freezing cold.

name: Magmafish
description: Some say this fish lays its eggs directly in molten lava!

name: Pufferfish
description: Tasty when cooked right, but the flavour has a bit of a sting.

name: Pike
description: A freshwater fish that needs a lot of seasoning.

name: Tuna
description: Chicken of the sea...

name: Tetra
description: Spending its whole life in the dark, it has no need for eyes.

name: Trollfish
description: This fish is a nuisance in the local streams.

name: Giant Herring
description: Fermented, this fish will smell worse than the swamp it came from.

name: Grouper
description: Best served with lots of carbs!

name: Coral Cod
description: It has seen some things... Some very haunting things...

name: Anglerfish
description: The dangling light makes it easier to see that pretty little face!

name: Fish 'n' Bread
description: Bounty from both land and sea.

name: Uncooked Fish 'n' Bread
description: Ready for the oven.

name: Raw Fish
description: A good catch.

name: Cooked Fish
description: A tasty side of smoked fish.

name: Raw Fish
description: A good catch.

name: Fish Wraps
description: Bread and fish, what more to wish?

name: Fishing Bait
description: Common dvergr fishing bait. Fishing rod sold separately.

name: Hot Fishing Bait
description: Some fish already like it where the waters are warm, and this bait brings the temperature close to boiling.

name: Cold Fishing Bait
description: This bait doesn't look like much, but it's a treat to fish that live where it's cold and dark.

name: Frosty Fishing Bait
description: It's not very nutritious, so the only fish that'll take this bait are the ones that are used to just eating ice.

name: Mossy Fishing Bait
description: Dead trolls in the forest often attract a fish or two, speed up the process with this bait!

name: Misty Fishing Bait
description: A bait to guide the fish to you through shrouded waters.

name: Heavy Fishing Bait
description: This bait sinks deep, deep enough to lure the fish swimming along the very bottom of the sea.

name: Stingy Fishing Bait
description: You're not immune to deathsquito bites, and the fish here aren't immune to this snack!

name: Sticky Fishing Bait
description: It might smell foul, but the fish drawn to this bait are used to so much worse.

name: Fishing Rod
description: Standard issue dvergr fishing rod.

name: Paws of the Bear
description: Made for tearing and rending.

name: Vilebone Maulclaws
description: These claws will rend flesh and bone alike.

name: Flesh Rippers
description: If claws work for wolves, why not for a viking?

name: Ancient Metal
description: A withered metal from ancient times. No one knows what it was once used for.

name: Flametal
description: According to legend, this metal was used by the gods themselves to craft powerful weapons.

name: Glowing Metal Ore
description: A withered metal from ancient times. No one knows what it was once used for.

name: Flametal Ore
description: Warm to the touch with glowing veins of strange metal. Needs to be refined in a blast furnace.

name: Flax
description: Unspun fibers from a flax plant.

name: Flint
description: Can be shaped into sharp blades.

name: Fragrant Bundle
description: These plants carry a strong but pleasant scent. However, it's possible that not all creatures agree...

name: Freeze Gland
description: This mysterious organ keeps a perfect temperature.

name: Fresh Seaweed
description: The saltwater scent of this plant makes you think of the wide open ocean.

name: Iolite
description: Light is reflected sharply off of this gem, or does it come from within the stone itself?

name: Jade
description: This gem pulses with energy, almost as if it were a living thing.

name: Bloodstone
description: You wonder how many deals have been made to appease this gem. How many palms have bled onto it in exchange for its power?

name: Blood Clot
description: Be careful not to puncture this while you carry it...

name: Fuling Totem
description: Channels the ancient power of Yagluth.

name: Grausten
description: Porous yet sturdy.

name: Greydwarf Eye
description: The milky eyeball of a Greydwarf.

name: Guck
description: It smells like fermented fish.

name: Hammer
description: With this to your hand, you can raise high halls and mighty fortifications.

name: Hard Antler
description: A piece of very hard antlers.

name: Hare Meat
description: The meat of a hare is scant but toothsome.

name: Bonemass heart
description: $item_healthupgrade_description

name: Elder heart
description: $item_healthupgrade_description

name: Hood of Ask
description: As the first man of Midgard, Ask knew it was important to not draw too much attention to himself.

name: Headdress of the Bear
description: Let the primal rage of a mighty bear consume you.

name: Vilebone Visage
description: Inspiring fear in foes and courage in kin when worn.

name: Bronze Helmet
description: This will help to keep your brains inside your skull.

name: Carapace Helmet
description: People might say you look like a giant ant. But they will only say it once.

name: Celebratory Cap
description: You simply can't help but feel happy when donning this cap!

name: Drake Helmet
description: An elaborate and finely-crafted helm.

name: Dverger Circlet
description: A portable perpetual lightsource for the dungeon explorer.

name: Fenris Hood
description: The eyes of the beast were wise and knowing, so that it could measure the strength of a warrior in one glance.

name: Fishing Hat
description: This catchy hat may only be reeled in by the most seasoned adventurers.

name: Flametal Helmet
description: While you're wearing this helmet, your enemies will think twice before trying to bite your head off.

name: Blue Tied Headscarf
description: A blue practical headscarf.

name: Simple Purple Cap
description: A simple yet fashionable purple cap.

name: Green Twisted Headscarf
description: A fancy green headscarf.

name: Brown Fur Cap

name: Extravagant Green Cap
description: A warm cap for special occasions.

name: Simple Red Cap
description: A simple yet fashionable red cap.

name: Yellow Tied Headscarf

name: Red Twisted Headscarf
description: A fancy red headscarf.

name: Grey Fur Cap
description: A warm fur cap, made from the finest wool.

name: Extravagant Orange Cap
description: A warm cap for special occasions.

name: Iron Helmet
description: A helm of polished iron, fit for a hero.

name: Leather Helmet
description: A hood of toughened leather.

name: Eitr-weave Hood
description: Sorcery shows itself in the eyes, so most mages wear cowls to disguise their occult pursuits.

name: Hood of Embla
description: Even the first sorceress valued the mystique of covering one's face. It is rumoured that honouring her this way will make your spells even more powerful.

name: Midsummer Crown
description: Celebrate summer with a crown woven from flowers.

name: Hood of Odin
description: Odin's finest warriors deserve the finest cloth.

name: Padded Helmet
description: A snug fit, finely made.

name: Pointy Hat
description: This hat is sure to add a bit of magical flair to any outfit.

name: Root Mask
description: Your head fits perfectly inside this knot of roots and bark.

name: Straw Hat
description: The perfect way to avoid sunstroke.

name: Headband
description: It feels a bit...moist.

name: Troll Leather Hood
description: Trollskin is hard to work but makes exceptional armour.

name: Yule Hat
description: A red cap in the style of house gnomes.

name: Hildir's Brass Key
description: It seems to be missing its owner...

name: Hildir's Silver Key
description: It seems to be missing its owner...

name: Hildir's Bronze Key
description: It seems to be missing its owner...

name: Hoe
description: A farmer's tool for working the earth.

name: Honey
description: Sweet and tasty.

name: Honey Glazed Chicken
description: Grilled to perfection. Makes both eyes and mouths water.

name: Uncooked Honey Glazed Chicken
description: Ready for the oven.

name: Iron
description: A bar of pure iron ready to be worked.

name: Iron Nails
description: Needed for advanced construction projects.

name: Iron Ore
description: Unrefined iron. Needs to be refined in a smelter.

name: Scrap Iron
description: It's old and rusty but can be smelted and used again.

name: Iron Pit
description: An empty vessel waiting to be filled with firewood and kindling.

name: Blue Jute
description: Made from natural fibers and dvergr hair.

name: Red Jute
description: A sturdy, rough fabric.

name: Black Metal Knife
description: A darkling blade. Strong and sharp.

name: Butcher Knife
description: A butcher's knife designed specifically for slaughtering tamed animals.

name: Abyssal Razor
description: A knife from the deep.

name: Copper Knife
description: A glittering copper knife.

name: Flint Knife
description: Sharpened flint. A reliable tool.

name: Silver Knife
description: A savage piece of pain.

name: Skoll and Hati
description: Stab once for those who've betrayed you, and twice for those you hate.

name: Wooden Knife
description: Some people would say this knife is better for butter.

name: Dvergr Lantern
description: A simple torch would just be so old fashioned.

name: $item_larva
description: $item_larva_description

name: Leather Scraps
description: A small pile of leather scraps.

name: Linen Thread
description: A fine linen thread made out of a strong flax filament.

name: Lox Meat
description: A raw slab of marbled meat.

name: Lox Pelt
description: A heavy pelt of thick, musty fur.

name: Lox Meat Pie
description: Break the crust to release a cloud of fragrant steam. Delicious!

name: Unbaked Lox Pie
description: Ready for the oven.

name: Bronze Mace
description: A headache on a stick.

name: Flametal Mace
description: Dense yet spiked flametal, perfect for bashing enemy faces in.

name: Bloodgeon
description: The blood all but soaks into this mace, and it always yearns for more.

name: Storm Star
description: Particularly effective on cloudy mornings.

name: Klossen
description: If the force of your blow isn't enough to knock your enemies to the ground, perhaps the primal roots will hold them down for you.

name: Iron Mace
description: A fist-sized lump of iron on a wooden shaft.

name: Porcupine
description: A deadly weapon, bristling with fiendish spikes.

name: Frostner
description: The dead fear silver. Remind them why.

name: Wooden Mace
description: One has to wonder why someone made this instead of a simple club.

name: Stuffed Mushroom
description: Bursting with magical flavour.

name: Uncooked Stuffed Mushroom
description: Ready for the oven.

name: Mandible
description: The hand of man could hardly design a more perfect weapon.

name: Marinated Greens
description: It's spicy, it's chewy, it's sweet… This mad dish tickles your tongue as well as your mind.

name: Mashed Meat
description: Leftover meat can actually be pretty tasty if you just mash it right!

name: Anti-Sting Concoction
description: The perfect drink for a day in the Plains.

name: Berserkir Mead
description: Something poisonous stirs within, brewed to the point where its potential can finally be harnessed. But be careful to let the beast out...

name: Lingering Eitr Mead
description: Increases eitr regeneration.

name: Minor Eitr Mead
description: Restores eitr.

name: Frost Resistance Mead
description: Protects against the cold.

name: Tonic of Ratatosk
description: The squirrel must be quick on its feet as it runs up and down the trunk of the world tree. Although it no longer visits Valheim, there are still those who remember it...

name: Lingering Healing Mead
description: Increases health regeneration.

name: Major Healing Mead
description: Restores health.

name: Medium Healing Mead
description: Restores health.

name: Minor Healing Mead
description: Restores health.

name: Lightfoot Mead
description: This bottle is full, yet it feels like it weighs almost nothing at all.

name: Poison Resistance Mead
description: Fortifies you against poison.

name: Lingering Stamina Mead
description: Increases stamina regeneration.

name: Medium Stamina Mead
description: Restores stamina.

name: Minor Stamina Mead
description: Restores stamina.

name: Mead of Troll Endurance
description: What creature can carry more than a troll? Why, a viking with this drink of course!

name: Draught of Vananidir
description: You feel invigorated just by holding this, as the ocean beckons you to come for a swim.

name: Brew of Animal Whispers
description: It smells like a pigsty. Likely the taste won't be much better.

name: Tasty Mead
description: The nectar of the Gods, divine mead.

name: Love Potion
description: An intense musk permeates the air around this bottle.

name: Meat Platter
description: Battle fuel.

name: Uncooked Meat Platter
description: Ready for the oven.

name: Mechanical Spring
description: A mysterious contraption built by the Dvergr. Used to build traps.

name: Minced Meat Sauce
description: Chunks of goodness in a thick gravy.

name: Misthare Supreme
description: One of life's Great Pleasures.

name: Uncooked Misthare Supreme
description: Ready for the oven.

name: Molten Core
description: Potent energy swirls within, ready to be unleashed.

name: Morgen Heart
description: It's hard to believe it has ever beaten.

name: Morgen Sinew
description: Chewy.

name: Mushroom
description: Bounty of the forest.

name: Blue Mushroom
description: Glows with a soft blue hue.

name: Toadstool
description: Some say you can eat everything you find in the forest. That is not the case with this mushroom.

name: Jotun Puffs
description: Swollen with magic, these golden orbs bubble from the ground where the Jotun fell.

name: Magecap
description: The delicate blue magecaps crackle like nerve-endings with sorcerous vitality.

name: Mushroom Omelette
description: A delicious omelette with an earthy aftertaste.

name: Smoke Puff
description: Hopefully it tastes better after cooking.

name: Yellow Mushroom
description: An energetic glowing mushroom.

name: Neck Tail
description: Inedible when raw, but proves to be quite a tasty snack if cooked.

name: Grilled Neck Tail
description: This savoury, charcoal-grilled meat has a slight aroma of seaweed and grass.

name: Needle
description: The pointy end of a Deathsquito.

name: Obsidian
description: Dark volcanic glass.

name: Onion
description: A crunchy and spicy taste.

name: Onion Seeds
description: Plant to grow a healthy onion.

name: Onion Soup
description: Deliciously rich.

name: Ooze
description: Rotten and putrid-smelling. Why do you want this?

name: Antler Pickaxe
description: This tool is hard enough to crack even the most stubborn rocks.

name: Black Metal Pickaxe
description: A good strong pick of glistening dark metal.

name: Bronze Pickaxe
description: A good bronze pick. Can break very hard rocks.

name: Iron Pickaxe
description: A sturdy tool of hardened iron.

name: Stone Pickaxe
description: A rock-breaker made of stone.

name: Pine Cone
description: Plant it to grow a pine tree.

name: Piquant Pie
description: It takes some time and effort to make this pie, but the taste is well worth it.

name: Uncooked Piquant Pie
description: Ready for the oven.

name: Pot Shard
description: A fragment of something brittle.

name: $item_pot_shard_red
description: A fragment of something brittle.

name: Powdered Dragon Eggshells
description: Dragon egg is a hard and difficult material to work with, yet here it has been ground to a fine, glittering dust...

name: Proustite Powder
description: This unstable powder packs great potential.

name: Bukeperries
description: Allows the consumer to quickly evacuate any misplaced meal and start anew.

name: Pungent Pebbles
description: An earthy odour clings to these dried lumps. It's best to not think too hard about what they are.

name: Queen Bee
description: The queen of the bees!

name: Majestic Carapace
description: Her majesty's will was hard and unrelenting, but this piece of carapace is perhaps even more so.

name: Queen's Jam
description: That classic tasty blend of raspberries and blueberries.

name: Raspberries
description: Sweet and delicious.

name: Boar Meat
description: $item_boar_meat_description

name: Resin
description: Sticky tree resin which insulates well. If put to the flame it burns slow and steady.

name: Roasted Crust Pie
description: This dessert keeps you going all day long.

name: Uncooked Roasted Crust Pie
description: Ready for the oven.

name: Root
description: An old root from an ancient tree stump. It feels both flexible and durable at the same time.

name: Rotten Meat
description: There are maggots crawling in the meat. It smells awful.

name: Corewood
description: Perfect for building log cabins.

name: Royal Jelly
description: Jelly fit for kings and queens.

name: Ruby
description: <color=yellow>Valuable</color>

name: Asksvin Saddle
description: The back of an asksvin is rather lumpy, so you'll need a saddle if you want to ride one.

name: Lox Saddle
description: Use on a lox to be able to ride it.

name: Salad
description: Fresh, crisp leaves.

name: Sap
description: Sacred blood from the Great Tree.

name: Sausages
description: Links of savory, smoked meat.

name: Scale Hide
description: A pelt of glittering scales.

name: Scorching Medley
description: A varied diet is important, so why not try this vegetarian option?

name: Scythe
description: The right tool makes the task at hand so much easier.

name: Scythe Handle
description: A sturdy base for a tool.

name: Seeker Aspic
description: A quivering jelly with a taste like gentle electricity.

name: Serpent Meat
description: A slice of sea serpent. Smells fishy.

name: Cooked Serpent Meat
description: A cooked slice of sea serpent. Smells good.

name: Serpent Scale
description: The shiny metal-like scale from a sea serpent.

name: Serpent Stew
description: Smells of honey and serpent...

name: Sharpening Stone
description: A whetstone wheel ready to spin.

name: Banded Shield
description: Banded with hoops of iron, a true warrior's companion.

name: Black Metal Shield
description: Fashioned from the strongest metal, able to turn even the deadliest blades.

name: Black Metal Tower Shield
description: A tower shield of gleaming dark metal.

name: Bone Tower Shield
description: The bones of dead warriors make for a good protection.

name: Bronze Buckler
description: A shield of burnished bronze, good to turn a blade or two.

name: Carapace Shield
description: The almost unbreakable carapace of your enemies makes an excellent shield.

name: Carapace Buckler
description: The skull of a seeker is solid but not heavy, which makes it perfect for a small and agile shield.

name: Shield Core
description: A protective force within is ready to be unleashed.

name: Flametal Shield
description: The shield is and always will be a viking's most important weapon.

name: Flametal Tower Shield
description: The best defence is a great defence.

name: Iron Buckler
description: Its lightness and curved center makes it excellent for deflecting attacks.

name: Iron Shield
description: An iron sword-breaker, tile of the battle-wall.

name: Iron Tower Shield
description: A tall shield of strong iron.

name: Serpent Scale Shield
description: A sturdy shield of overlapping scales.

name: Silver Shield
description: A shield of radiant silver.

name: Wood Shield
description: A simple wooden shield.

name: Wood Tower Shield
description: A rough but heavy wooden shield.

name: Muckshake
description: Wakes you up!

name: Silver
description: A bar of pure silver ready to be worked.

name: Silver Necklace
description: <color=yellow>Valuable</color>

name: Silver Ore
description: Unrefined silver. Needs to be refined in a smelter.

name: Sizzling Berry Broth
description: This soup settles in your stomach with an almost tingly sensation.

name: Demolisher
description: This mighty sledge yearns to wreak havoc.

name: Iron Sledge
description: A mighty hammer, worthy of a champion.

name: Stagbreaker
description: A weapon worthy of the Gods! If you get hit with this, you'll know it...

name: Wooden Sledge
description: This should probably hurt more than it does.

name: Soft Tissue
description: It still fizzes softly with ancient memories.

name: Sparkler
description: It's a stick that sparkles. Pretty!

name: Sparkling Shroomshake
description: Perhaps it's not the best flavour to start the day with, but it will give you the boost you need.

name: Bronze Spear
description: A sturdy spear with a head of burnished bronze.

name: Carapace Spear
description: Sharpened to jagged perfection, this spear is sure to be deadly.

name: Abyssal Harpoon
description: The ocean's wrath.

name: Ancient Bark Spear
description: Despite its gnarled look, this spear is strong and perfectly balanced.

name: Flint Spear
description: If your eye marks a thing for death, let your arm send the messenger.

name: Splitnir
description: Split your enemies' hearts in two.

name: Splitnir the Bleeding
description: A small sacrifice must be made for every battle...

name: Splitnir the Storming
description: Let the crack of thunder split the air.

name: Splitnir the Primal
description: Nature's forces burst through the ground wherever this spear strikes.

name: Fang Spear
description: Even in death, the wolf's tooth aches for flesh.

name: Wooden Spear
description: This is just as sharp as a real spear, if a real spear was made out of wood.

name: Fiery Spice Powder
description: Whatever spices have been used in this blend, they must come from someplace hot. And as if that wasn't enough, they have also been dried and smoked before being ground into a fine powder.

name: Woodland Herb Blend
description: Thyme and marjoram carefully harvested and dried, before being mixed together. This blend will turn even the most basic of ingredients into a delicious feast.

name: Herbs of the Hidden Hills
description: A good herbalist knows exactly where to go to find ramsons, but she won't tell you the secrets of her trade! Still, if you have the coin for it you may treat yourself to this blend of finely harvested ramson bulbs and leaves.

name: Mountain Peak Pepper Powder
description: Only the most seasoned herbalist can find the pepperwood tree and harvest its leaves and bark. After careful preparation it's ready to be added to food, and is sure to give it some warming heat.

name: Seafarer's Herbs
description: The sour tang of sorrel, mixed with something the herbalist would rather not disclose, is well suitable for fish. Any fisherfolk worth their salt would do well to keep this blend near, in case of a good catch!

name: Grasslands Herbalist Harvest
description: This blend utilises all aspects of the lovage plant, a rarity in the tenth world. Roots, leaves and seeds have all been gathered, and then mixed together in the perfect quantity.

name: Spicy Marmalade
description: Sugary honey perfectly balanced with tangy fronds and tart berries.

name: Staff of Fracturing
description: Only those with patience and focus will be able to harness the true power of this staff.

name: Staff of Embers
description: The sweltering heat of Muspelheim seems almost pathetic when compared to what this staff can do...

name: Staff of the Wild
description: Ancient natural forces lie curled and dormant within this staff, ready to be unleashed.

name: Staff of Frost
description: A staff as cold as the three-year winter that will herald the end of times.

name: Dundr
description: What happens next may shock you.

name: Trollstav
description: Summons a raging beast to cause death and destruction.

name: Staff of Protection
description: For a slight blood offering it will protect the caster in a magical shell.

name: Dead Raiser
description: Sacrifice a bit of blood to raise the dead. Upgrade the skull to spawn multiple skeletons, and increase your blood magic to make them stronger.

name: Stamina Greydwarf
description: $item_staminaupgrade_description

name: Stamina Troll
description: $item_staminaupgrade_description

name: Stamina Wraith
description: $item_staminaupgrade_description

name: Stone
description: It's a rock.

name: Rock
description: It's a stone.

name: Sulfur
description: Smells like rotten eggs.

name: Surtling Core
description: It throbs with inner heat.

name: Black Metal Sword
description: A thing of death and beauty. It catches the light with a greenish glow.

name: Bronze Sword
description: Blood-drinker. A thirsty friend.

name: Dyrnwyn
description: The sword that was broken is whole once more. Its flames burn hot, fuelled by the memories of ancient warriors.

name: Iron Sword
description: The straight line between life and death runs along the edge of this blade.

name: Dyrnwyn
description: Unsheathed, it sizzles and spits with deathless fire, an impossible blade.

name: Mistwalker
description: The faint glow seems to slice through the mist.

name: Nidhögg
description: Named after the evil dragon that dwells by the roots of the world tree, this sword heralds doom for those who cross its path.

name: Nidhögg the Bleeding
description: If you bleed, your foes are sure to do so as well.

name: Nidhögg the Thundering
description: The power of lightning dances along the blade of this sword, a promise of the pain to come.

name: Nidhögg the Primal
description: Tangle your foes in roots, like the namesake of this blade.

name: Silver Sword
description: Purest of metals, nothing unclean can abide its touch.

name: Wooden Sword
description: Mostly harmless, unless you're very persistent.

name: Krom
description: As deadly as it is shiny, and it's very shiny.

name: Slayer
description: This mighty blade thirsts for the blood of foes.

name: Brutal Slayer
description: If it bleeds, you can kill it.

name: Scourging Slayer
description: The lightning bound into this blade is erratic, ever searching for something to strike.

name: Primal Slayer
description: The blade works in tandem with the primal forces of the world, seeking death and slaughter.

name: Wooden Greatsword
description: Would you be careful with that, please?

name: Tankard
description: Skål!

name: Horn of Celebration
description: One year since we arrived... Skål!

name: Mead Horn of Odin
description: Odin's finest warriors deserve the finest drinks.

name: Dvergr Tankard
description: It can hold a lot of mead!

name: Tar
description: A sticky lump of tar.

name: Thistle
description: Beautiful but prickly.

name: Thunder Stone
description: It is crackling with energy.

name: Tin
description: A bar of pure tin ready to be worked.

name: Tin Ore
description: Unrefined tin. Needs to be refined in a smelter.

name: Torch
description: It brings light and warmth, drives back the darkness.

name: $item_torchmist
description: It brings light and warmth, drives back the darkness.

name: Bracelets of the Brave
description: Your mind hardens, as do your blows.

trinketEffect.name: Bracelets of the Brave
trinketEffect.tooltip: Increased mace damage, and a quick health burst regeneration.

name: Evasion Mantle
description: Dance with death as you dodge your enemies' strikes.

trinketEffect.name: Evasion Mantle
trinketEffect.tooltip: Increased dodge skill and reduced block stamina cost.

name: Heart of the Forest
description: It pulsates with fragments of ancient life.

name: Bronze Pendant
description: A beautiful pendant, harbouring the endurance of a bear.

name: Pulsating Earrings
description: If you listen carefully, you can hear the faint echoes of lost souls...

name: Fins of Destiny
description: Empty your mind as you become shapeless and one with the water.

trinketEffect.name: Fins of Destiny
trinketEffect.tooltip: Reduced swim stamina cost and increased swim speed.

name: Jörmundling
description: Tormented screams resonate from within.

trinketEffect.name: Jörmundling
trinketEffect.tooltip: Increased elemental and blood magic skill, and a quick burst of eitr regeneration.

name: Brimstone
description: It's warm, as if filled with a lifesblood of its own.

trinketEffect.name: Brimstone
trinketEffect.tooltip: A quick burst of both health and stamina regeneration.

name: Iron Brooch
description: A delicate yet defensive accessory.

trinketEffect.name: Iron Brooch
trinketEffect.tooltip: Increased armour and a quick burst of health regeneration.

name: Nimble Anklet
description: Puts a spring in your step!

trinketEffect.name: Nimble Anklet
trinketEffect.tooltip: Increased run speed and a quick burst of stamina regeneration.

name: Resounding Shackle
description: A razor-sharp ankle chain. Can it truly be comfortable?

trinketEffect.name: Resounding Shackle
trinketEffect.tooltip: Increased slash damage and a quick burst of stamina regeneration.

name: Wolf Sight
description: Assume the sharp and furious mind of a wolf.

trinketEffect.name: Wolf Sight
trinketEffect.tooltip: Increased bow skill, spear skill, and increased pierce damage.

name: Crystal Heart
description: A shard of frozen sorrow. Touching it makes you feel almost numb.

trinketEffect.name: Crystal Heart
trinketEffect.tooltip: Increased resistance against blunt, slash and pierce damage.

name: Troll Hide
description: A thick and sturdy hide. This is why trolls are so hard to kill.

name: Abomination Trophy
description: It's been dead so long that it started living again.

name: Asksvin Trophy
description: Don't let yourself be fooled by the friendly smile, for it could easily bite your arm off.

name: Bear Trophy
description: That stare is still frightening...

name: Vile Trophy
description: These eyes are finally vacant for good.

name: Blob Trophy
description: A smelly lump of sticky matter.

name: Boar Trophy
description: This boar head would make for a nice decoration in any house.

name: Bonemass Trophy
description:
Bones and viscous goo, held together by some unseen force.

Offer it to the Sacrificial Stones.

name: Bonemaw Trophy
description: A skull made up of dense bone, as dangerous as it is protective.

name: Marksman Trophy
description: These legs could hold infinite power.

name: Warlock Trophy
description: A warm glow seems to almost emanate from within. Handle with care.

name: Warrior Trophy
description: Fractures line this skull, as if it has taken many hits over the years.

name: Cultist Trophy
description: The fire in its eyes has still not burned out.

name: Geirrhafa Trophy
description: He's giving you an icy stare.

name: Deathsquito Trophy
description: You don't like touching this thing even when it's dead.

name: Deer Trophy
description: A fine specimen but you'll need to kill more than deer to enter Valhalla.

name: Moder Trophy
description:
The head of a dragon, majestic even in the rigor of death.

Offer it to the Sacrificial Stones.

name: Draugr Trophy
description: Bind up the mouth if it starts to whisper in the night...

name: Draugr Elite Trophy
description: The dead stare of the glowing red eyes sends a shiver through your bones.

name: Draugr Trophy
description: Bind up the mouth if it starts to whisper in the night...

name: Dvergr Trophy
description: It's frankly a little troubling that you would consider hanging these on your wall...

name: Eikthyr Trophy
description:
This severed head oozes power.

Offer it to the Sacrificial Stones.

name: Fader Trophy
description:
The green dragon, corrupted beyond redemption.

Offer him to the sacrificial stones.

name: Fallen Valkyrie Trophy
description: Though she is dead, she yearns for the blood to flow.

name: Fenring Trophy
description: Half-way between wolf and man, its face frozen in a snarl of pain.

name: Troll Trophy
description: The leathery skin bears the faded tracery of ancient symbols.

name: Troll Trophy
description: The leathery skin bears the faded tracery of ancient symbols.

name: Ghost Trophy
description: Does it still whisper about unfinished business?

name: Gjall Trophy
description: Hopefully it won't float away.

name: Fuling Trophy
description: Loose folds of greenish skin gathered in around a pair of dark and hateful eyes.

name: Fuling Berserker Trophy
description: The huge grizzled head is as heavy as a boulder.

name: Thungr Trophy
description: Not so tough now.

name: Zil Trophy
description: In the choice of 'ride or die', he picked the latter.

name: Yagluth Trophy
description:
The crownless head of a dead king.

Offer it to the Sacrificial Stones.

name: Fuling Shaman Trophy
description: Even killing it couldn't wipe the knowing smile from its crooked lips...

name: Greydwarf Trophy
description: The mossy, severed head of a Greydwarf.

name: Greydwarf Brute Trophy
description: It took seven blows to hack this gnarled head from its body.

name: Greydwarf Shaman Trophy
description: It may try to come back so be sure to prune any new shoots...

name: Growth Trophy
description: A black and sticky mess.

name: Hare Trophy
description: These are said to bring luck. But not for their original owner.

name: Drake Trophy
description: Still cold to the touch.

name: Kvastur
description: A witch's best friend.

name: Leech Trophy
description: Although slimy, the skin is beautifully patterned in red and black.

name: Lox Trophy
description: A giant beast's head, thatched with thick fur.

name: Morgen Trophy
description: The waking nightmare has met its end.

name: Neck Trophy
description: The beady eyes and razorsharp teeth belies the ostensibly calm nature of this small lizard.

name: Stone Golem Trophy
description: This crystalline rock formation would make for an impressive floor decoration.

name: Seeker Trophy
description: Less delicate than they look. The leather of the wings catches the firelight as if remembering flight.

name: Seeker Soldier Trophy
description: The head of a fallen champion.

name: The Queen Trophy
description:
She has seen enough.

Offer it to the Sacrificial Stones.

name: Serpent Trophy
description: The scales have dulled but the eyes are still bright.

name: Skeleton Trophy
description: The expressionless grin of this skull reminds you of the inevitability of death.

name: Brenna Trophy
description: Still burning, somehow.

name: Rancid Remains Trophy
description: A rank and rotten skull. You're not sure why you kept it...

name: Surtling Trophy
description: Wreathed in pale flame, it still smolders like an ember.

name: The Elder Trophy
description:
This severed head oozes power.

Offer it to the Sacrificial Stones.

name: Tick Trophy
description: It's a conversation piece...

name: Ulv Trophy
description: A rugged tail from a not so good boy.

name: Volture Trophy
description: It's like a vulture, but it thrives in volcanic climates.

name: Wolf Trophy
description: Frozen in death, the hair matted with blood and a silent howl lodged in its throat.

name: Wraith Trophy
description: The shed skin of a wraith, a flowing robe only visible by moonlight.
